div.h1: Bloom Filter Technical Specification & Memory Mapping
div.p: Revision: 1.0.4 | Target Architecture: x86_64 / ARMv8-A Memory Profile: m=256 bits (32 bytes), k=3 hash functions Properties: Fixed-size probabilistic membership. False Positive Rate ~2%.

ul.li: bit[n] is located at byte[n >> 3] with mask 1 << (n & 7).
